sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2026-03-06 17:10
- Distance: 4.4 km
- Moving time: 25:36
- Elapsed time: 26:13
- Elevation gain: 78.4 m
- Average heart rate: 178.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 198 bpm
- Average watts: 218.9 W
- Average speed: 10.4 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `240` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `177.8 bpm`, ranging from `108.0` to `198.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `168.5 bpm` and second-half average HR was `187.2 bpm` (+18.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `172.5 spm`, with a working range of `100.0` to `206.7 spm` after excluding `3` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `176.6 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `168.5 spm` (-8.1 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:46 /km` across `4.433 km` in `25:36` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:36 /km` and second-half pace was `5:56 /km` (+20 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `178.4 bpm` average and `198 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `168.3 bpm` in the first half and `186.9 bpm` in the second (+18.6 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `25:36` out of `26:13` elapsed (97.6%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `10` stop segments and `1.7%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `83.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.4 m` and `63.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `38.0 m` in the first half and `45.4 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
